project.name: StudyGuard (UngdungRenTuHocChoHocSinh)
project.description: App giám sát học sinh tự học qua camera + AI (MediaPipe)

business_rules.name: Strict AI Mode
business_rules.logic: Hand on Face (20s), Idle Lookup (45s), Agitation (7s)

business_rules.name: Reward Policy (15m)
business_rules.logic: Min 15m study time + Max 1 violation = Blind Bag

business_rules.name: Institutional Access
business_rules.logic: Admin/Teacher accounts (is_admin=true) are redirected to /teacher-dashboard and have system-wide monitoring

api_endpoints.desc: Học sinh vào phòng bằng mã 6 ký tự
Giao diện quản lý tập trung cho giáo viên (Admin only)
Thống kê tổng quát toàn hệ thống

patterns: MediaPipe Camera Utils for continuous frames
gotchas: Git credentials required for automated push from agent tools
